---
title: "compiler.ts"
path: "C:/Users/Craig/Corvus/CorvusStar/src/tools/pennyone/intel/compiler.ts"
loc: 96
complexity: 7
logic_score: 2.88
style_score: 3.94
intel_score: 7.00
overall_score: 5.06
---

## Intent
A functional component of the Corvus Star static analysis matrix.

## Interaction Protocol
Import and utilize via the standard project structure.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 2.9/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.9/10
- **Intel [I]**: 7.0/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 40 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [FileData](file://../analyzer.ts)
- [*](file://fs/promises)
- [*](file://path)
- [registry](file://../pathRegistry.ts)

### Exports
- `compileMatrix`
- `compileMatrix`
- `statsDir`
- `graphPath`
- `knownPaths`
- `resolveDependency`
- `absolute`
- `normalizedImport`
- `candidates`
- `extensions`
- `p`
- `indexFile`
- `payload`
